prompt: Create a realistic high-end boutique mannequin photo of an elegant anime-inspired angel character, Mireia, posed in a clothing store with soft natural window light and shallow depth of field. The mannequin has a smooth white faceless head partially covered by a plain square gray privacy censor block, extremely long silver-white hair flowing past the waist, and a cluster of pale pink lilies with green leaves tucked into the hair near the right temple. Above the head is a translucent clear acrylic halo disk with a white thorny circular emblem printed on it, catching highlights like polished plastic. The mannequin wears a pristine white military nun dress: fitted white uniform dress with gold piping, short cape-like sleeves over glossy white long sleeves, double-breasted gold buttons, a black ribbon bow at the chest, a small round red-and-gold chest emblem, gray harness straps crossing the torso, a wide gray waist belt, and a dark navy or black skirt panel visible below the coat. Add one white feathered angel wing on the viewer’s right side, curved upward behind the body. Pose the mannequin with the left arm bent behind the head and the right hand on the hip, emphasizing a fashion display figure with glossy plastic hands. Attach a rectangular white shop tag hanging from the belt reading ミレニア / Saint Lily Dress / ¥24,800. Include exactly three small hand-drawn Japanese squeak sound effects in white, each reading キシッ: one near the raised left arm, one near the right wing, and one near the lower left waist area. Background: softly blurred upscale apparel shop with clothing racks, warm beige interior lighting, large bright window on the left, realistic lens blur, premium product photography, vertical 3:4 composition, clean highlights, no extra people, no watermark.
